content.text:
Subagent orchestration gate
Result: use-subagent-orchestrator
Reason: Strong orchestration signals detected.

Subagents:
- so_mapper
  mode: read-only
  scope: changed modules and execution paths
  expected output: files, dependencies, uncertainty
  constraints: no recursive fan-out
- so_reviewer
  mode: read-only
  scope: security and architecture risks
  expected output: real findings only
  constraints: no recursive fan-out
- so_tester
  mode: read-only
  scope: missing test coverage
  expected output: targeted tests and gaps
  constraints: no recursive fan-out

Synthesis:
- Risks: security and architecture concerns were reviewed.
- Tests/verification: run security-sensitive regression tests.
